ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacies" (
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacy */,
  "pharmacy_name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmacy */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the pharmacy */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the pharmacy */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pharmacy */,
  "business_hours" TEXT /* Business hours of the pharmacy */,
  "payment_options" TEXT /* Payment options accepted by the pharmacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the product */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of a single unit of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "storage_instructions" TEXT /* Special storage instructions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who ordered the prescription */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy where the prescription was ordered */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product prescribed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product prescribed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the prescription was ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., pending, approved, fulfilled) */,
  "prescriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescriber_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments provided by the doctor */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the prescription */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription is expected to be picked up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacy_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last reordered */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pharmacy_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pharmacy_inventory_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescription_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "prescription_id" TEXT /* ID of the prescription */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the prescription (e.g., refill, cancel, update) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescription_history_prescription_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescription_id") REFERENCES prescriptions ("prescription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_pharmacy_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy */,
  "preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pharmacy is a preferred choice for the patient */,
  "preferred_for" TEXT /* Reason why the pharmacy is preferred (e.g., location, hours, service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_pharmacy_preferences_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_pharmacy_preferences_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacy_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., pharmacist, technician) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the staff member's role */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Level of experience of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pharmacy_staff_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescription_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "prescription_id" TEXT /* ID of the prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the patient */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient who submitted the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescription_reviews_prescription_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescription_id") REFERENCES prescriptions ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescription_reviews_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
